privileged_info_summary: The task requires setting Short Title fields (Jurism database field ID 3) for three real US Supreme Court cases. All case names are verified: Brown v. Board of Education (347 U.S. 483, decided May 17, 1954), Miranda v. Arizona (384 U.S. 436, decided June 13, 1966), and Obergefell v. Hodges (576 U.S. 644, decided June 26, 2015). The expected short titles are 'Brown', 'Miranda', and 'Obergefell' respectively. The data comes from actual, publicly documented Supreme Court cases hardcoded in inject_references.py. The task involves locating these three cases in the Jurism reference library and setting their Short Title fields via the GUI.
